decisions: The Songs score must preserve the current alphaTab renderer; custom HTML, canvas, or replacement score grids are forbidden.
The Design Agent has no authority over the rendered Songs score surface. The user-approved technical specification and Verifier own score compliance.

refinement_notes.note: Reduce alphaTab chord effect-band bottom padding so chord symbols sit closer to each system and measure; preserve all approved Songs score rules and keep Design Agent out of the score surface.
Move alphaTab chord text itself closer to the staff because zero effect-band padding still leaves excessive vertical distance; preserve bar alignment, four bars per system, and all Songs score rules.
Increase the approved alphaTab chord text vertical offset from 6 to 10 score units at the user's request; preserve all other score behavior.

history.event: Planner completed plan.json; routed to Design Agent
Design Agent completed browser-backed design.json with music-visual-instrument profile; routed to Builder
User required preservation of alphaTab and excluded the Songs score from Design Agent authority; discarded the custom renderer direction and refined plan/design boundaries
Builder preserved alphaTab, normalized all Songs entries to chord-only AlphaTex, enforced four full-width measures per system, padded final systems, and added the permanent Songs score protocol
Verifier passed focused tests, TypeScript, lint, production build, imported/generated route parity, and desktop/mobile browser checks
Design Critic reviewed only the unchanged surrounding Songs shell; the alphaTab score remained out of scope as required
Code Critic approved the implementation with no blocking findings; Supervisor marked the run done

Refinement requested for builder: Reduce alphaTab chord effect-band bottom padding so chord symbols sit closer to each system and measure; preserve all approved Songs score rules and keep Design Agent out of the score surface.
Builder reduced alphaTab chord effect-band bottom padding from 6 to 0 and added chord proximity to the permanent Songs score specification.
Verifier passed mobile and desktop chord-proximity checks, four-measure and width regression checks, focused tests, TypeScript, lint, and production build.
Design Critic reviewed only the unchanged surrounding shell, Code Critic approved the minimal alphaTab setting change, and Supervisor marked the refinement done.

Refinement requested for builder: Move alphaTab chord text itself closer to the staff because zero effect-band padding still leaves excessive vertical distance; preserve bar alignment, four bars per system, and all Songs score rules.
Builder confirmed horizontal bar alignment and moved only alphaTab chord text vertically by 6 score units.
Verifier passed mobile chord proximity, extended-chord legibility, four-bar layout, overflow, console, focused test, TypeScript, lint, and production build checks.
Design Critic reviewed only the unchanged shell, Code Critic approved the idempotent SVG text adjustment, and Supervisor marked the refinement done.
Refinement requested for builder: Increase the approved alphaTab chord text vertical offset from 6 to 10 score units at the user's request; preserve all other score behavior.
Builder increased only the chord-text vertical offset from 6 to 10 score units.
Verifier passed mobile glyph collision, four-bar layout, overflow, console, TypeScript, lint, and production build checks; reviews approved and Supervisor marked the refinement done.
